summary: Iteration 3 — full backend regression + Phase B + Deviation Module verification. Regression suite (/app/backend/tests/test_izqms_backend.py + test_phase_a.py) = 56/56 PASS (token-revocation fix from iter_2 holds). New Phase B suite (/app/backend/tests/test_phase_b.py) = 18/18 PASS covering attachments upload/list/download/delete, exports (records.csv + records.xlsx PK header + audit.csv), form-schemas GET/PUT, risk-score RPN+band+range validation, reports/trend + reports/aging, password-reset CONSUME via token, and the full 9-Part Deviation flow (Part1→OPEN, Part6→IN_REVIEW, Part9 QA review→APPROVED, Part9 QA head closure→CLOSED), extensions, department-comments, e-sign wrong-password=401, PDF export (binary >2KB starting with %PDF). All required audit actions (DEVIATION_EDIT/SIGN/EXTENSION_REQUEST/DEPT_COMMENT/PDF_EXPORT, ATTACHMENT_UPLOAD/DOWNLOAD/DELETE, FORM_SCHEMA_UPDATE, EXPORT_*) are emitted. Frontend smoke: admin login → dashboard (sidebar shows Form Builder for admin ✓), Reports page renders 2 recharts charts (Monthly trend + Aging) plus CSV/Excel/Print buttons, Form Builder page loads with Deviation module preselected and fields editable.

minor.issue: Requires reason inside JSON body (AttachmentDeleteIn). API contract in PRD listed it as query param. Tests adapted; main agent may want to document properly.
Body schema requires `module` field that duplicates the path param; server enforces strict match. Frontend already sends it but API would be cleaner without the duplication.

Field names are `revised_target_date` + `justification` (not `requested_days`/`reason`+`password`). E-signature password is NOT required by this endpoint — a regular authenticated user can request extensions without password re-auth, which is unusual for Part 11 'controlled action'. Consider wrapping with e-sig if extensions are part of audit-critical signoff.
Field is `comments` (plural). No e-sig required — same concern as extensions.

issues: Email/password inputs have no name/type=email attributes — selector by [type='email'] fails; should add name=email + type=email for accessibility and standard form autofill.

action_items: (Optional) Tighten Part-11 controls on /deviations/{id}/extensions and /department-comments — currently require auth only, no e-sig password. Recommend e-sig wrap since these mutate controlled record state.
(Optional) Add type='email' / name attributes to Login inputs for better autofill + a11y.
(Optional) PUT /api/form-schemas/{module} accepting body without `module` (since path already conveys it) — minor API ergonomics.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2083 lines — heavily overdue for module split (auth/users/records/deviation/attachments/exports/form_schemas/reports). Suggest extracting deviation routes (~1860-2083) into deviation_routes.py.
deviation_pdf.py + reportlab generation: PDF works (verified %PDF header + >2KB). Consider caching the PDF for repeat downloads.
/api/auth/forgot-password still writes the reset link to the application log in clear text — Part 11 docs should explicitly note this must be gated behind a DEBUG flag in production.
Risk-score endpoint validates 1–5 via Pydantic Field constraints (returns 422 for out-of-range) — good.

All e-signature controls on /deviations/{id}/sign correctly verify current user's password BEFORE writing the signature row and audit (DEVIATION_SIGN). 9-Part status auto-progression matches spec: part1→OPEN, part6→IN_REVIEW, part9_qa_reviewed_by→APPROVED, part9_qa_head_closure→CLOSED.
Exports CSV/XLSX/audit endpoints return correct content types and emit corresponding audit rows. Confirmed PK zip header on XLSX.

success_rate.frontend: Smoke pass — login, dashboard, sidebar, Reports (recharts visible), Form Builder all load without errors

test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin@izqms.com / Admin@izQMS2026. All 4 seed users authenticate.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_PhB DEVIATION records created (~10) plus TEST_ users from Phase A still in DB. No cleanup performed (no DELETE endpoints).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three pytest suites: test_izqms_backend.py (26), test_phase_a.py (30), test_phase_b.py (18) — all green. PDF generation, form-builder PUT, deviation 9-part state transitions, attachments lifecycle, exports content-types, and password-reset CONSUME via mongo-fetched token are now under regression coverage. Frontend Login form lacks type='email' on email input — use input[0]/input[1] indexing or add name attributes before writing more playwright scripts.
rca of the issue: No critical bugs found in iteration 3. Minor inconsistencies between PRD-documented API shapes and implementation (extension/dept-comment field names, attachment delete body vs query) were resolved by adapting tests to match implementation.
